title: Verify existing notification system implementation
description: The notification system described in this task already exists and is fully implemented. Verified components: Notification model (src/models/notification.ts), NotificationService (src/services/notifications.ts) with CRUD + mark-as-read operations, Notification collection (src/collections/Notifications.ts), API routes (GET/POST/PATCH at src/app/api/notifications/), utility helpers (src/utils/notificationHelpers.ts), and unit tests for all modules (notifications.test.ts, notificationHelpers.test.ts). No additional work required.
existing_patterns: src/models/notification.ts - Domain model with TypeScript types and interfaces
src/services/notifications.ts - Service class using Payload SDK with dependency injection via constructor
src/routes/notifications.ts - Express-style route handlers with withAuth HOC wrapper
src/utils/notificationHelpers.ts - Pure utility functions for formatting and filtering
src/collections/Notifications.ts - Payload collection config with access control
